title: BUG: Person column is not persisting values selected
excerpt:
Hello 
We have an issue which seems to be happening now for over 4 hours - when we try to pick a person in the “Person” column - it shows as selected, but on refreshing the page - the value goes back to blank. Does anyon…

posts.author: jasmined (Jasmine Dsouza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

We have an issue which seems to be happening now for over 4 hours - when we try to pick a person in the “Person” column - it shows as selected, but on refreshing the page - the value goes back to blank. Does anyone else see this issue?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Jasmine! Sorry to be hopping in here so late! Hopefully, this issue is resolved now but if you ever encounter a bug like this, please shoot us an email at support@monday.com so our technical support engineers can get to work on it right away. Thanks, Jasmine!
